messages.content: translate the text from japanese to english. context is a card game
I am sorry, but no text was provided in Japanese to be translated into English. Please provide the text and I will be happy to assist you with the translation.
戦闘開始
"Battle start"
カード購入
"Buy a card"
ゲーム音量
"Game volume"
攻撃
"Attack"
強化：与えるダメージが50％上がる
"Enhancement: Damage dealt increases by 50%"
勇猛：数値分カードの攻撃力が上がる
"Valour: Card's attack power increases by its numerical value"
次にプレイするカードは再実行+1
"The next played card is replayed +1"
覚醒：全てのカードが再実行+1
"Awaken: All cards are replayed +1"
：ターン開始時に数値分ダメージ
"[Card ability]: At the beginning of the turn, deal damage equal to its numerical value"
毒：ターン開始時に数値分ダメージ
"Poison: At the beginning of the turn, deal damage equal to its numerical value"
骨折：与えるダメージが30％ダウン
"Fracture: Damage dealt is reduced by 30%"
デッキが空になると、捨て札が自動的にシャッフルされ、新たなデッキとして再利用されます。
"When the deck runs out, the discard pile is automatically shuffled and reused as a new deck."
ラウンド５以下で敗北
"Defeat if the game ends before round 5."
defeated might be better
You are correct. "Defeated" would be a better word choice in this context. So the translation would be: "Defeated if the game ends before round 5."
translate it similar to defeated under round 5 or less
"Loss if the game ends before round 5."
骨折:与えるダメージが30％減少する
"Fracture: Damage dealt is reduced by 30%"
強化:与えるダメージが50％上昇する
"Enhancement: Damage dealt increases by 50%"
